newOffer.title: Start a new offer
newOffer.description: Draft an offer from a customer request.

integrations.title: Data sources
integrations.subtitle: The more context you give Solivio, the sharper the offers. Connect the systems you already use.

productCatalog.name: Product Catalog
productCatalog.description: Thousands of SKUs at hand — the right products picked for each request without digging through catalogs.

erp.name: ERP
erp.description: Current products, pricing, and order history straight from your ERP — Solivio always works with real data.

crm.name: CRM
crm.description: Pull customer profiles and start every quote already personalized.

priceRules.name: Price Rules
priceRules.description: Volume thresholds, contract discounts, category margins — applied automatically, no manual math.

inventory.name: Inventory
inventory.description: See real-time stock as you build the offer. No more quoting items that aren't on the shelf.

industryKnowledge.name: Industry Knowledge
industryKnowledge.description: Capture industry and segment specifics so Solivio reads each request in the right context.

documentation.name: Documentation
documentation.description: Technical sheets, specs, and sales materials — used when picking products and explaining the choice.

historicalOrders.name: Historical Orders
historicalOrders.description: Customer keeps ordering the same items? Solivio recognizes the pattern and reuses it on the next offer.

rfqBenchmarks.name: RFQ Benchmarks
rfqBenchmarks.description: Seen a similar request before? Solivio learns from past offers to speed up the next ones.

productReviews.name: Product Reviews
productReviews.description: Factor customer feedback and preferences into recommendations and substitutes.

form.title: Create offer
form.description: Provide the customer details and request text.

notices.initial: Fill in the request and generate a draft offer.
notices.error: Could not generate offer right now. Please try again.

generation.dialogDescription: The draft offer is being prepared from the customer request.
generation.title: Preparing draft offer

readingRequest.title: Reading request
readingRequest.description: Capturing the customer context and raw request text.

extractingNeeds.title: Extracting needs
extractingNeeds.description: Finding product lines, quantities, and constraints.

preparingSearches.title: Preparing searches
preparingSearches.description: Building catalog-ready queries for each request item.

searchingCatalog.title: Searching catalog
searchingCatalog.description: Checking candidates and semantic similarity scores.

checkingGaps.title: Checking gaps
checkingGaps.description: Separating confident matches from items for review.

composingDraft.title: Composing draft
composingDraft.description: Pricing matched products and saving the offer draft.

builder.noRequestText: No customer request text was attached to this draft.

review.resizeLabel: Resize offer review and assistant panes

validation.title: AI Validation Result
validation.chatPrompt: Please help me resolve the problems listed above.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Totals and the checks needed before this draft is sent.

checks.missingAvailability: {count, plural, one {# line needs availability confirmation} other {# lines need availability confirmation}}

products.title: Products
products.description: Review the matched products, quantities, and pricing first.
products.unmatchedDescription: The following items from the customer's request could not be mapped to any products in our catalog:
products.empty: No products in this offer yet.

timeline.checkpoint: Revisions are saved automatically as you edit.

empty.description: Generate structured offer drafts based on your customer requests.
empty.title: No offers yet

matchingEmpty.description: Adjust the search term, status, or customer filter to widen the queue.
matchingEmpty.title: No matching offers

notes.generation: {count, plural, one {# generation note} other {# generation notes}}

offersList.title: Offers
offersList.subtitle: Review generated drafts, spot missing product matches, and continue the customer conversation from one queue.

productSearchDialog.description: Search the catalog and adjust quantities before adding products to the offer.

offerChat.welcome: I can explain this offer, summarize the client request, review product matches, and suggest improvements.
